title: luzula multiflora var. frigida
intro: Luzula multiflora var. frigida is a perennial plant species within the sedge family (Juncaceae) and is often referred to as the frigid woodrush. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Luzula multiflora var. frigida can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to soothe respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
